title: French Crusted Cheesecake Crumble
description: A rich and creamy cheesecake with a crunchy French crusted crumble topping.
instructions: Prepare a 9-inch springform pan with parchment paper.
Mix graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter. Press into the prepared pan.
Melt chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments.
Beat eggs, sour cream, and vanilla extract in a separate bowl.
Gradually pour the melted chocolate into the egg mixture and mix until combined.
Pour the cheesecake mixture into the prepared pan over the crust.
Bake for 55-60 minutes or until the edges are set.
Let cool completely on a wire rack.
Prepare the French crusted crumble by mixing crumbs and melted butter. Crumble the mixture over the cooled cheesecake.
Bake for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the crumble is golden brown.
